debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
h : e.eval ≠ Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args
⊢ (if Exp.eval (Clap.bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) - e.eval = 0 then Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ cs else denotation.n) =
    denotation.n

failed_attempts:
by_cases h' : Exp.eval (bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) - Exp.eval e = 0
  · exfalso
    apply h
    have : (Exp.eval (bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args)) = Exp.eval e := sub_eq_zero.mp h'
    simpa [Exp.eval, this] using (reduce₂ (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) (args := args) (e := e) (cs := cs) rfl)
  · simp [h', Cs.eval]

have hne : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) - Exp.eval e ≠ 0 := by
    intro hz
    apply h
    have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = Exp.eval e := by
      linarith
    simpa [bits2num] using this.symm
  simp [hne]

rw [this]
      clear h_eq this
      revert v e
      induction w with
      | zero =>
        have : args = #v[] := by simp
        simp [this]
      | succ w ih =>
        intros e _ v
        have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
          ext i h
          match i with
          | .zero =>
            simp
            rfl
          | .succ i =>
            simp [add_comm]
        simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
        rw [this]
        have : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
        rw [←this] at ih
        specialize @ih (args.extract 1) (Exp.c (bits2num (args.extract 1))) rfl
        simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
          add_tsub_cancel_right] at ih
        simp [ih, Exp.eval]
    have he : e.eval = (bits2num_e args).eval := by
      have : (bits2num_e args).eval = e.eval := by
        have := this
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this
      simpa [this] using this.symm
    simpa [hb] using he.symm
  · simp [hx]

intro heq
    apply h
    have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = Exp.eval e := by
      simpa [sub_eq_zero] using heq
    simpa [bits2num, this] 
  simp [hb]

have hb : (Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) - e.eval) ≠ 0 := by
    intro hz
    apply h
    have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
      unfold bits2num_e bits2num
      induction w with
      | zero =>
        have : args = #v[] := by simp
        simp [this, Vector.foldl]
      | succ w ih =>
        have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
          ext i hi
          cases i with
          | zero => simp
          | succ i => simp [add_comm]
        simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
        rw [this]
        simp [Vector.foldl, ih, Exp.eval]
    exact by simpa [sub_eq_zero] using hz
  simp [hb]

· exfalso
    apply h
    have : (bits2num_e args).eval = e.eval := by
      simpa [sub_eq_zero] using h0
    simpa [bits2num, this]
  · simp [h0]

· exfalso
    have : (bits2num_e args).eval = e.eval := by
      simpa [Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero] using h0
    apply h
    simpa [bits2num, this] 
  · simp [h0]

have hne : Exp.eval (bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) - Exp.eval e ≠ 0 := by
    intro hz
    apply h
    have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) = bits2num p inst✝ w args := by
      unfold bits2num_e bits2num
      simpa using (by rfl : (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => Exp.v b + Exp.c 2 * acc) (Exp.c (0 : ZMod p)) args).eval =
        Vector.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0 args)
    simpa [sub_eq_zero] using (this ▸ hz)
  simp [hne]

have : (bits2num_e args).eval = e.eval := by
    simpa [sub_eq_zero] using this
  simpa [this]

by_cases h0 : Exp.eval (bits2num_e (p:=p) (var:=ZMod p) args) - Exp.eval e = 0
  · exfalso
    apply h
    have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e (p:=p) (var:=ZMod p) args) = Exp.eval e := sub_eq_zero.mp h0
    simpa [this]
  · simp [h0]

have hb : (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) args).eval = bits2num (p := p) args := by
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num
    induction w with
    | zero =>
      have : args = #v[] := by simp
      simp [this]
    | succ w ih =>
      have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext i hi
        cases i with
        | zero =>
          simp
          rfl
        | succ i =>
          simp [add_comm]
      simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
      rw [this]
      have hw : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
      have ih' : (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => Exp.v b + Exp.c 2 * acc) (Exp.c (0 : ZMod p))
          (Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head).extract 1).eval =
          Vector.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) (0 : ZMod p)
          (Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head).extract 1 := by
        simpa using (ih (args := (Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head).extract 1))
      simp [Vector.foldl, hw, ih', Exp.eval, mul_add, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
  have : (Exp.eval (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) args) - e.eval) ≠ 0 := by
    intro hz
    have : e.eval = bits2num (p := p) args := by
      have : (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) args).eval - e.eval = 0 := by simpa using hz
      have : (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) args).eval = e.eval := sub_eq_zero.mp this
      simpa [hb] using this.symm
    exact h this
  simp [this]

have hb : (Exp.eval (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) (w := w) args) - Exp.eval e) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h0
    apply h
    have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) (w := w) args) = Exp.eval e := by
      simpa [sub_eq_zero] using h0
    simpa [this]
  simp [hb]

have h' : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args - e) ≠ 0 := by
    intro hz
    apply h
    have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) - Exp.eval e = 0 := by simpa using hz
    have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = Exp.eval e := sub_eq_zero.mp this
    have hb : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
      unfold bits2num_e bits2num
      induction w with
      | zero =>
        have : args = #v[] := by simp
        simp [this]
      | succ w ih =>
        have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
          ext i hi
          cases i with
          | zero => simp
          | succ i => simp [add_comm]
        simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
        rw [this]
        have : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
        have := ih (args := args.extract 1)
        simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
          add_tsub_cancel_right] at this
        simp [Vector.foldl, Exp.eval, this, Vector.getElem_extract, this_1]
    simpa [this] using this.symm
  have : (if Exp.eval (bits2num_e args - e) = 0 then Cs.eval cs else denotation.n) = denotation.n := by
    simp [h']
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using this

· exfalso
    have : (bits2num_e args).eval = e.eval := by
      simpa [sub_eq_zero] using h0
    apply h
    simpa [bits2num] using this.symm
  · simp [h0]

· exfalso

        simpa [Exp.eval]
      have : (bits2num args) - e.eval = 0 := by simpa [Exp.eval, hb] using h0
      exact sub_eq_zero.mp this |>.symm
    exact h this
  · simp [h0]

by_cases hx : Exp.eval (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) (w := w) args) - Exp.eval e = 0
  · exfalso
    apply h
    have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) (w := w) args) = bits2num (p := p) (w := w) args := by

      induction w with
      | zero =>
        have : args = #v[] := by simp

      | succ w ih =>
        have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
          ext i h
          match i with
          | .zero =>
            simp
            rfl
          | .succ i =>

        rw [this]
        simp [Vector.foldl, ih]
    have heq : Exp.eval e = bits2num (p := p) (w := w) args := by
      have : Exp.eval e = Exp.eval (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) (w := w) args) := by

        symm

by_cases h' : Exp.eval (bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) - e.eval = 0
  · have : e.eval = bits2num args := by
      have hb : (bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args).eval = bits2num args := by
        unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
        induction w with
        | zero =>
          have : args = #v[] := by simp

        | succ w ih =>
          have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
            simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
            ext i hi
            cases i with
            | zero => simp
            | succ i =>
              simp [add_comm]
          simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
          rw [this]
          simp [Exp.eval, ih, Vector.foldl]
      have : (bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args).eval = e.eval := by
        have := sub_eq_zero.mp h'
        simpa [hb] using this
      simpa [this] using hb
    exact (h this).elim
  · simp [h']

have hb : (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) args).eval = bits2num (p := p) args := by
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num
    simpa using (by
      induction w generalizing args with
      | zero =>
          have : args = #v[] := by simp
          simp [this, Vector.foldl]
      | succ w ih =>
          have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
            simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
            ext i hi
            cases i with
            | zero => simp
            | succ i => simp [add_comm]
          simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
          rw [this]
          simp [Vector.foldl, ih])
  have : Exp.eval (bits2num_e (p := p) (var := ZMod p) args) - e.eval ≠ 0 := by
    intro h0
    apply h
    have : e.eval = bits2num (p := p) args := by
      have := congrArg (fun t => t + e.eval) h0
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_neg, add_zero, hb] using this
    simpa [this]
  simp [this]
